name: empty-demo
visual_summary: The empty-demo component is a minimal, unstyled HTML element container, often used as a placeholder in design systems. It's typically used when a developer wants to reserve space in a layout without rendering any UI elements. The empty-demo component can be used in any part of a web application, but it's most commonly found in UI kits and design systems.
